title: Chicken Cabbage Soup
description: A comforting chicken soup with carrots, celery, potatoes, and shredded cabbage in a thyme-scented broth.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the carrots, celery, and onion; cook and stir until crisp-tender, 5-7 minutes. Add the garlic; cook 1 minute longer.

Stir in the broth, potatoes, cabbage, thyme, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer until vegetables are tender, 10-15 minutes. Stir in the chicken; heat through. If desired, top with parsley.
